title: Xtra Smoky Roasted Norwegian Potato Casserole
description: A hearty, smoky, and flaky Norwegian dish perfect for midnight cravings, featuring ground ginger and a blend of vegetarian-friendly ingredients. This casserole is roasted to perfection with a crispy exterior and a tender interior.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with olive oil, smoked paprika, and ground ginger until they are evenly coated.
In a separate pan, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic until they are softened and fragrant.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes, followed by a layer of sauteed onion and garlic, and then a sprinkle of shredded cheese.
Repeat the layering process until all the ingredients are used, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Pour the vegetable broth over the casserole, making sure that all the ingredients are moistened.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
